keywords.name: My name is none of your business.
keywords.alesar: That is my name. So what!
keywords.job: What does it look like, fool? I'm a smith! But I won't sell you anything until Malor orders me otherwise.
keywords.trade: I won't sell you anything, human. Malor doesn't want me to trade with strangers.
keywords.permission: I won't sell you anything, human. Malor doesn't want me to trade with strangers.
keywords.daraman: Don't you dare mention Daraman in my presence, human. I am through with his insidious lies and through with your accursed race!
keywords.haroun: Haroun? What? You know ... where do you know that name from? Did he send you?
keywords.human: I used to have illusions about you humans. I thought humans were good, noble creatures. ...
keywords.djinn: One day we will teach your race a lesson it will never forget.
keywords.efreet: The efreet are those djinn who never fell for Daraman's insidious propaganda. I wish I would have been as smart from the start. ...
keywords.marid: Those among my brothers and sisters who still do not see the truth call themselves the Marid. I used to be one of them, but I left them when the truth dawned upon me. ...
keywords.gabel: Gabel is a kind-hearted, honest djinn. I would hate to see him die just because he believes in Daraman's lies. ...
keywords.king: We need a strong king to unite us in our struggle against the humans.
keywords.malor: Malor is overambitious and unnecessarily cruel, but he is the only djinn who could unite our race, so I follow him. ...
keywords.mal'ouquah: I do not like this place. But then it does not really matter where I am. I have a forge and I don't see any humans. That's all I need. ...
keywords.ashta'daramai: Ashta'daramai is Gabel's fortress which lies to the north. ...
keywords.zathroth: Legend has it that Zathroth was trying to make us beings of unalloyed evil, but he found us to be impure, so he abandoned us and started over. ...
keywords.tibia: One day we djinn will rid this world of evil.
keywords.darashia: I don't care about human cities. If I had my way, they would all be burnt to down today.
keywords.edron: I don't care about human cities. If I had my way, they would all be burnt to down today.
keywords.thais: I don't care about human cities. If I had my way, they would all be burnt to down today.
keywords.venore: I don't care about human cities. If I had my way, they would all be burnt to down today.
keywords.kazordoon: I don't care about human cities. If I had my way, they would all be burnt to down today.
keywords.carlin: I don't care about human cities. If I had my way, they would all be burnt to down today.
keywords.ab'dendriel: I don't care about human cities. If I had my way, they would all be burnt to down today.
keywords.ankrahmun: I don't care about human cities. If I had my way, they would all be burnt to down today.
keywords.pharaoh: The pharaoh in Ankrahmun is a dangerous fool. Just your typical human, in other words.
keywords.ascension: What are you talking about? More human pseudo-philosophical flapdoodle?
keywords.rah: What are you talking about? More human pseudo-philosophical flapdoodle?
keywords.uthun: What are you talking about? More human pseudo-philosophical flapdoodle?
keywords.akh: What are you talking about? More human pseudo-philosophical flapdoodle?
keywords.scarab: I like them. They are peaceful, but if they are provoked they fight ferociously. And they are know to eat humans!
keywords.kha'zeel: These mountains are our refuge from those pesky humans. Too bad there are always some who come up here anyway. You, for example.
keywords.kha'labal: The desert Kha'labal was once a beautiful land, but it was devastated in the course of the war. Damn humans! This is all your fault!
keywords.melchior: I remember him. He was a greedy, double-dealing hyena. As far as I know his bleached bones are now lying somewhere in the Kha'labal.
keywords.djema: Djema? Well - I suppose she is the only human I still like. But she has been brought up by djinns. Who knows - perhaps humans can learn.
keywords.baa'leal: So Baa'leal thinks you are up to do a mission for us? ...
keywords.bo'ques: I miss Bo'ques' cooking, but not his pompous airs and graces.
keywords.fa'hradin: Fa'hradin, that old cynic is way too smart to believe in Daraman's lies. He should reconsider his loyalties.
keywords.wares: I sell and buy weapons, armors, helmets, legs, and shields.
keywords.offer: I sell and buy weapons, armors, helmets, legs, and shields.
keywords.goods: I sell and buy weapons, armors, helmets, legs, and shields.
keywords.smith: I sell and buy weapons, armors, helmets, legs, and shields.
keywords.equipment: I sell and buy weapons, armors, helmets, legs, and shields.
keywords.do: I sell and buy weapons, armors, helmets, legs, and shields.
keywords.you: I sell and buy weapons, armors, helmets, legs, and shields.
keywords.sell: I sell and buy weapons, armors, helmets, legs, and shields.
keywords.have: I sell and buy weapons, armors, helmets, legs, and shields.
keywords.weapon: At this time I'm only selling ice rapiers and serpent swords. But I would buy scimitars, giant swords, serpent swords, poison daggers, knight axes, dragon hammers and skull staffs from you.
keywords.shield: I am selling only ancient shields. But I buy tower shields, black shields, ancient shields and vampire shields.
keywords.armor: I am buying and selling dark armors. But I would also buy a knight armor from you.
keywords.helmet: I am buying and selling dark helmets. Furthermore I'm buying warrior helmets, strange helmets and mystic turbans.
keywords.trousers: At this time I'm only buying knight legs.
keywords.legs: At this time I'm only buying knight legs.
keywords.mission: Don't forget to talk to Malor concerning your next mission.
keywords.gem: Did you find the tear of Daraman?
keywords.tear: Did you find the tear of Daraman?
keywords.work: Don't forget to talk to Malor concerning your next mission.

texts: What do you want from me, ?
What does it look like, fool? I'm a smith! But I won't sell you anything until Malor orders me otherwise.

greetingPatterns.response: What do you want from me, %N?

entries.response: Treacherous liar! You would not be here if you had really talked to him. Get out of my sight or I will test my latest sabre on you!
<sighs> Of course not. How could you ... Well, at least you are honest, human. I appreciate that.
All right then, human. Have you ever heard of the 'Tears of Daraman'? ...
So you have made it? You have really managed to steal a Tear of Daraman? ...
As I expected. You haven't got the stone. Shall I explain your mission again?
No chance, human. Malor doesn't want me to trade with strangers.
You do not have enough gold.
No chance, human. Malor doesn't want me to trade with strangers.
